title: Demorfi Burger Exploded Handwritten
source_attribution: De Morfi by Los Troncos · Burger campaign (Argentina)
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Hand-written script + sans body footer + brand-mark
why_good: Exploded burger ingredients flutuando = F03 exemplar para 'motion' family
Hand-written PT-script labels weaving entre ingredientes = info-graphic warmth playful
Dark brown bg flat = NOT wood deck (FAM-F03-01 respeitado)
Wooden table no bottom dá grounding sem competir
caveats: Hand-written labels playful style é distante de Só Rio Cormorant. Mas estrutura exploded-ingredients + flat-bg é exemplar F03
